### ripr gap: missing boundary assertion

Changed behavior:
`amount == threshold_a`

Why this matters:
A related test reaches this code, but no equality-boundary assertion was found.

Repair route:
add boundary assertion

Repair:
Add one focused boundary assertion for `amount == threshold_a`.

Verify:
`ripr agent verify`
